---
title: Reorganization of Cortico-Cerebellar Networks Reflects Progression from Familial Risk to Psychotic Illness
presenter: Kami Pearson
pres_group: presentations
date: '2026-05-01'
event: SOBP 2026
description: Kami Pearson, Katrina Aberizk, Caroline Demro, Byron A. Mueller, Scott R. Sponheim, Jessica A. Turner
image: presentation.jpg
page-layout: full
---

![](presentation.jpg){width="100%" fig-align="center"}


![](kamipresent.jpeg){fig-align="center"}
